prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生明显增加及专业热度分化等因素，在 2025 年基准 15016 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 15216 名，区间 14716–15716 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17090→17815→14370→16203→15016, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, it moved forward significantly, then shifted backward in 2024–2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 15016th place. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 86→89→92→97→100 students, with a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 100 students, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 62nd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative or positive public opinion events. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 overall rankings, indicating average attention. There is no historical record of admission gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering correspond to the Energy and Power category, with a 2024 popularity assessment of 'Recommended'. Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly sought after, positively driving overall applications. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, indicating possible adjustments in exam difficulty. The university is located in Beijing, offering some regional appeal to Hunan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and the divergence in major popularity, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 15016th place, with the ranking shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15216th place, with a range of 14716–15716th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14716–15716, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<14716), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence. For rankings near the upper limit (>15716), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3316→13201 (abnormal in 2022)→no data→3284→2860. In 2026, the plan is only 2 students, a 50% reduction compared to 2025, significantly changing the competitive landscape.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Only two majors are offered in the History Category: Ideological and Political Education and English (Global Energy Governance). The social popularity of the Ideological and Political Education major is stable, while foreign language majors are generally viewed with caution. The number of provincial History Category examinees in 2026 is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, raising the competition threshold. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for Hunan examinees.

预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in historical rankings, the 50% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase in provincial History Category examinees, the reduction in enrollment moves the ranking forward (easier to enter), but the large increase in examinees partially offsets this effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2102, with a range of 1724–2480.
